notable_links: El-P produced Cannibal Ox's The Cold Vein — both El-P and Vast Aire are in collection
Nick Cave guested on Johnny Cash's American IV: The Man Comes Around — both in collection
Jimmy Page played guitar on Robert Plant's Now & Zen — Plant in collection, Page via Led Zeppelin in collection
Bob Dylan's Nashville Skyline features Johnny Cash on 'Girl from the North Country' — both in collection
Shane MacGowan (The Pogues) guests on Nick Cave's Murder Ballads — both in collection
